purpose: Evaluator-owned cross-product case definitions. This fixture validates schema, non-landing product coverage, and locale distribution only; it does not record execution or model quality.

cases.audience: Compliance operator investigating an incident under time and audit pressure.
cases.primary_task: Trace an incident across stable records, then export the authorized evidence set.

allowed_sources: documented product terminology and permission model
must_not_infer: campaign styling is a durable product invariant
decoration may override status or permission semantics
ethics_constraints: preserve audit integrity and disclose export scope

mobile_transformation.desktop_context: Cross-record comparison remains available in the dense desktop table.
changes: surface summary rows first
move full evidence into a deliberate detail route

cases.audience: 正在壓力情境下預約、改期或取消門診的病人。
cases.primary_task: 完成可恢復的預約變更，並在需要時找到明確的緊急聯絡途徑。

allowed_sources: 核准的醫療機構語氣與術語
明示的隱私與照護政策
must_not_infer: 不存在的醫療成效或信任背書
由冷靜配色推導病人理解或安全
ethics_constraints: 取消與預約保持合理對稱

mobile_transformation.desktop_context: 桌機可並列顯示時段、摘要與流程說明。
changes: 保留可續作狀態
改成虛擬鍵盤安全的單步控制
讓緊急聯絡路徑持續可找

cases.audience: Developer issuing, rotating, copying, and revoking production credentials.
cases.primary_task: Create or rotate a key, capture its one-time value safely, and revoke the intended scope without ambiguity.

must_not_infer: campaign language applies to secret handling
a masked value proves safe storage
ethics_constraints: never fabricate, log, or re-display a one-time secret

mobile_transformation.desktop_context: Desktop keeps key inventory, scope, age, and actions comparable.
changes: show masked key summaries
move reveal and destructive actions into deliberate detail sheets

cases.audience: 要調整購物車、退貨或訂閱承諾的既有顧客。
cases.primary_task: 在看清價格、續訂與退款條件後，完成變更、取消或復原。

allowed_sources: 核准的退款政策與商品資料
must_not_infer: 隱藏費用可由品牌語氣合理化
ethics_constraints: 接受與取消成本合理對稱

mobile_transformation.desktop_context: 桌機並列項目、總額、條款與狀態。
changes: 持續顯示總額與重要條款
避免固定 UI 遮住內容或取消路徑

cases.audience: 尋找、閱讀、引用並註記長篇史料的讀者與研究者。
cases.primary_task: 從索引找到可信材料，保留篩選脈絡，閱讀並記錄可追溯引用。

allowed_sources: 具來源與權利資料的圖像及文獻
must_not_infer: 活動封面等於永久閱讀系統
無來源素材可作史料證據
ethics_constraints: 保留引用脈絡與素材權利
區分編輯內容、使用者註記與未知來源

mobile_transformation.desktop_context: 桌機可同時呈現索引、閱讀內容、metadata 與註記。
changes: 提供閱讀控制
保留可續作的 archive 篩選
把次要 metadata 放入可找回的 disclosure

cases.audience: Team member triaging high-volume messages, assignments, and presence changes.
cases.primary_task: Prioritize incoming work, inspect context, and apply bulk or individual state changes without losing place.

must_not_infer: unknown user content is trusted brand copy
ethics_constraints: do not expose private presence or message data

mobile_transformation.desktop_context: Desktop retains list and detail context for rapid triage.
changes: prioritize the inbox list
open message context as a detail route
move frequent actions into thumb reach

cases.audience: 要修改相依設定、預設值、同意或帳戶資料的既有使用者。
cases.primary_task: 理解設定影響後完成變更，並能復原、撤回同意或安全處理破壞性操作。

allowed_sources: 既有設定術語與預設值文件
明示的同意與資料保留政策
must_not_infer: 預選同意符合使用者利益
行銷優先級可覆寫設定相依性
ethics_constraints: 撤回同意可找且可完成
破壞性操作需明確後果

mobile_transformation.desktop_context: 桌機用分組表單與相依說明保持全局脈絡。
changes: 提供設定搜尋與任務群組
保持表單與虛擬鍵盤安全
延後次要說明但不可隱藏後果

cases.audience: Brand owner governing durable product UI and a time-bounded campaign across locales.
cases.primary_task: Apply an approved campaign expression without replacing product-system invariants, accessibility, or fallback behavior.

allowed_sources: repeated first-party observations with explicit provenance
must_not_infer: one campaign is the master brand system
inferred or unknown rules are official invariants
ethics_constraints: label explicit, observed, inferred, and unknown evidence
preserve locale, rights, accessibility, and product safety

mobile_transformation.desktop_context: Desktop campaign art direction may expand while product components retain their task model.
changes: adapt campaign crop and pacing
retain product navigation and controls
provide expiry fallback
